_comment: Add this to your Claude Code MCP settings or ~/.claude.json mcpServers section

extradisplay._note: Install: sudo cp mcp/server.py /usr/local/bin/extradisplay-mcp && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/extradisplay-mcp. For enable/disable tools, add to sudoers: username ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/local/bin/extradisplay
